nonBlockingIssues.description: The default templates do not reference `agent_type`, `agent_version`, or `model_name`. Rendering succeeds when those variables are provided, but the metadata is currently unused in prompt text.
The default templates do not reference `agent_type`, `agent_version`, or `model_name`. Rendering succeeds when those variables are provided, but the metadata is currently unused in prompt text.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The python-worker skill recommends full-repo lint (`uv run ruff check .`), but mission AGENTS.md explicitly scopes lint to mission paths and warns against full-repo lint due upstream noise. The reviewed worker followed the skill and reported noisy full-repo lint output.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/skills/python-worker/SKILL.md:53, mission AGENTS.md:41-44, handoff verification command `uv run ruff check .`

commands: uv run python3 (rendered all 5 templates with spec/is_continuation/agent_type/agent_version/model_name for both continuation states)

summary: Review passed. The feature commit adds both required default templates and three reviewer variants, reviewer guidance is distinct and aligned with anti-slop/structural refactoring goals, and all templates render successfully with required variables for both continuation modes.
